title: Northern Trust Raises Prime Rate
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust has increased its prime rate from 8.25% to 8.50%, effective Thursday, July 27, 2023. About Northern Trust Northern Trust Corporation (Nasdaq: NTRS) is a leading provider of wealth management, asset servicing, asset management and banking to corporations, institutions, affluent families and individuals. Founded in Chicago in 1889, Northern Trust has a global presence with offices in 25 U.S. states and Washington, D.C., and across 22 locations in Canada, E.

title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: Stocks Rally on Solid Earnings News
text: The S&P 500 rose 0.2% on Wednesday, July 19, 2023 as the market rally continued to be fueled by solid earnings reports.

title: Northern Trust's (NTRS) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, NII Rises
text: An increase in NII as well as growth in AUC and AUM balances supported Northern Trust's (NTRS) Q2 earnings. However, rising expenses and declining fee income are headwinds.

title: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript

title: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.79 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.63 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.86 per share a year ago.

title: Northern Trust's Q2 profit drops on fee-based income weakness
text: Asset and wealth manager Northern Trust reported a 17% drop in second-quarter profit on Wednesday, as lower fee-based income dragged down gains from a boost in interest income.

title: Northern Trust Corporation Reports Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust Corporation has released its second quarter 2023 financial results. Results can be found at https://www.northerntrust.com/about-us/investor-relations as well as on the corporation's Current Report on Form 8-K filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on July 19, 2023, which is available on the SEC's website at https://www.sec.gov. title: Northern Trust Declares Quarterly Dividends on Common and Preferred Stock
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust Corporation (Nasdaq: NTRS), holding company of The Northern Trust Company, has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.75 per share on its common stock ($1.66-2/3 par value), payable on October 1, 2023, to holders of record at 5:00 p.m., Chicago time, on September 8, 2023. Northern Trust Corporation also declared cash dividends of $2,300 per share of its Series D non-cumulative perpetual preferred stock (resulting in a distribution of $23.00 per deposit.

title: Buy These High-Yield Blue-Chip Bargains, And Your Retirement Should Thank You
text: The market is melting up on the speculative hopes of an unprecedented "soft landing," for which the evidence is very slim. title: Northern Trust (NTRS) to Post Q2 Earnings: Will it Disappoint?
text: Despite higher rates, Northern Trust (NTRS) is expected to have recorded a decline in interest income in the second quarter of 2023 due to softer loan demand.

title: Northern Trust, NUS School of Computing and NUS Asian Institute of Digital Finance Join Forces to Support Blockchain Development for Institutional Use
text: SINGAPORE–(BUSINESS WIRE)–#assetservicing–Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS), the National University of Singapore’s School of Computing (NUS Computing) and Asian Institute of Digital Finance (NUS AIDF) today announced a series of research and industry development initiatives that will advance efforts to define the future of blockchain for institutional investors.
